overview.description: Software engineering consultancy building prototypes and long-term complex web and mobile apps
overview.description_long: SWEHQ (Software Engineers HQ) is a technically oriented software engineering company based in Prague 5. They build functional and usable web and mobile apps with a focus on usability (high-quality UI/UX) and maintainability (readable source code with automated tests). The team of ~10 mid-senior to senior developers works in TypeScript, Python, Angular, React, Vue.js, Django and Flutter. They also occasionally do machine learning, technical recruitment consulting, and software development consultancy.
overview.tagline: Software Engineers who care about quality of the apps you need

history.origin_story: Founded by Jan Walter (ex-Google, HPE, Solera) as a technically focused software engineering firm based at Impact Hub Prague.

key_milestones.event: Delivered frontend for Aukro.cz, the biggest Czech auction portal
Built iCentral project management tool for Google
Worked on DMS used by 100s of Czech public institutions

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: SWEHQ is a software engineering consultancy with minimal proprietary AI technology or data moat. Their core value proposition — writing high-quality web/mobile apps — is directly threatened by AI coding tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) that dramatically reduce the need for bespoke software engineering consultancies.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Software development consulting is a real and established market with proven demand (notable clients include Google, HPE). However, the market is highly competitive and AI-assisted coding is rapidly compressing margins and demand for traditional dev shops.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding; bootstrapped small team of ~10 people with no disclosed revenue or runway data. As a micro-consultancy, sustainability depends entirely on continued client engagements.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: High AGI displacement risk combined with high funding risk makes SWEHQ a high-overall-risk company. While their engineering quality and notable client portfolio (Google, HPE) demonstrate credibility, their consulting model with no proprietary AI tech and a very small team makes them highly vulnerable to AI-driven disruption of the software development services market.

metadata.notes: SWEHQ is primarily a software engineering consultancy with only incidental ML work. Their inclusion in Prague AI catalog appears to be due to occasional ML consulting and one team member (Jakub Rada) with CIIRC CVUT AI research background. Copyright notice says 2018-now; company IČ 06756107. Office at Impact Hub, Drtinova 557/10, Prague 5.
